commit.message:
Add host_wake_all_slots to pre-warm shadow FX before Song Mode playback

With Link Audio, Move's native track audio routes through shadow slots
for FX processing. When a track goes quiet, the slot idles and skips
rendering. On step transitions, the sudden audio arrival caused glitches
because FX state was stale. Wake all slots at playback start and each
step advance so FX chains run on zeros before audio arrives.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: harden GitHub Actions workflows against code injection and over-permissioning

- publish-process.yml: Move user-controlled inputs (issue title, repo name)
  from ${{ }} expression interpolation in run: blocks to env: vars, preventing
  shell injection via crafted issue titles (CodeQL alerts #1, #2)
- validate-dependencies.yml: Move ${{ github.repository }} to env var instead
  of inline Python string interpolation
- ci.yml, essay-deploy.yml, theory-to-art-watcher.yml, validate-dependencies.yml:
  Add explicit permissions blocks (principle of least privilege) to resolve
  CodeQL "Workflow does not contain permissions" warnings

Sprint 56: SECURITAS

commit.message:
docs(comments): edge traversal as autonomous Markov functor (pre-ADR-024)

Formalises: each edge traversal is a memoryless Markov step T(Asset_n, Context[]) → Asset_{n+1}.
F_D/F_P/F_H are computation engines (functors) for the same step — transport is a detail.
Derives: typed invocation contract (Mandate, StepResult, invoke()), filesystem stall
detection as the correct Markov liveness proxy, budget cap as transition cost bound.
Proposes: ADR-024 (invocation contract), ADR-017 update (Markov framing section).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update CLAUDE.md files with recent activity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[hipDNN] Add block scale dequantize frontend node (#5005)

## Motivation

Implements the block scale dequantize operation as a new frontend API
node in hipDNN. This adds support for block scaling semantics needed for
MX blocked low-precision data types (mxfp8, mxbfp8, mxfp6, mxfp4),
referencing the cuDNN frontend `Block_scale_dequantize_attributes` API.

## Technical Details

- Added FlatBuffer schema (`block_scale_dequantize_attributes.fbs`) with
tensor UIDs, block_size vector, and is_negative_scale flag
- Created `BlockScaleDequantizeAttributes` class with InputNames{X,
SCALE}, OutputNames{Y}, and cuDNN-matching typedef alias
`Block_scale_dequantize_attributes`
- Created `BlockScaleDequantizeNode` with validation
(pre_validate_node), property inference (infer_properties_node), and
FlatBuffer serialization (pack_node)
- Added `block_scale_dequantize()` graph method in `Graph.hpp` with
FlatBuffer deserialization support
- Added JSON serialization/deserialization support
- Follows existing patterns from RMSNorm node implementation
- Frontend integration test

## Test Plan

- Added 25 unit tests across two test files:
- `TestBlockScaleDequantizeAttributes.cpp` (14 tests): attribute
creation, getters/setters, move semantics, block_size overloads,
negative scale, typedef alias
- `TestBlockScaleDequantizeNode.cpp` (11 tests): pre-validation (valid
and invalid cases), property inference, FlatBuffer packing, tensor
gathering

## Test Result

- All 25 new BlockScaleDequantize tests pass
- All 1155 frontend tests pass (no regressions)
- BUILD: PASS, TEST: PASS

## Submission Checklist

- [x] Look over the contributing guidelines at
https://github.com/ROCm/ROCm/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md#pull-requests.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: building improvements, bot balance, and floor/ramp placement fixes

- Walk on buildings: height-aware wall collision (maxY field on envObjects)
  so player can walk freely on rooftops when above wall height
- Building rooftops tracked in buildingSurfaces[] for standing detection
- Bots kill each other faster: 2.5x bot-vs-bot damage, 25-unit attack range
- Floor snaps to ramp top when looking up (ceil snap instead of round)
- Floor connects at same level when elevated (forward-snap, Y = footY)
- Ramp staircase X/Z forward-snap when player is elevated
- Cannot build floating pieces: isSupported() check, ghost turns red
- Structural integrity: pruneUnsupported() BFS flood-fill cascades on destroy
- Ghost position uses real mouse cursor when pointer lock is inactive
- Hold mouse for auto-fire and hold-to-paint edit panels
- Win screen with animated #1 badge and VICTORY ROYALE gradient
- Keybind settings no longer leak keys into game after closing settings menu
- Build mode no longer requires pointer lock for placement (Mac fix)
- Q in edit mode exits edit then toggles build instead of being blocked

feat(ecr): add --latest flag to filter images by tag prefix

`awsx2 ecr-images <repo> --latest` groups images by their base tag prefix
(stripping trailing -<commit> or -latest suffixes) and keeps only the
newest image per group, hiding older builds.

commit.message:
Fix exec-approval bypass: warn against "Always Allow" for gog commands

The allowlist operates on binary paths, not subcommands. Tapping "Always
Allow" on any gog command permanently allowlists the entire gog binary,
causing gog gmail send to bypass approval. Added warnings to telegram.md,
AGENTS.md, and RUNTIME-CONFIG.md. Added autoAllowSkills and askFallback
safety settings documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: dedup workspace docs, separate personality from rules (#340)

* refactor: dedup workspace docs and separate personality from operational rules

SOUL.md was mixing personality philosophy with operational rules (conciseness,
privacy procedures, proactivity triggers, welcome message spec), causing
contradictions with AGENTS.md and duplicating guidance 3-4x across files.

- SOUL.md: strip to pure personality/philosophy, remove welcome message section,
  "What You Can and Can't Do", "The Short Version", and operational specifics
- AGENTS.md: absorb all operational rules — privacy, proactivity triggers,
  welcome message spec, conciseness. Single source of truth for behavior.
- HEARTBEAT.md: slim to just the mechanic + morning task, point to AGENTS.md
  for proactivity rules
- channel.ts: greeting dispatch defers to AGENTS.md instead of hardcoding
  format that overrides docs
- index.ts: slim DEFAULT_INSTRUCTIONS (was duplicating IDENTITY.md), fix
  writeInstructions() to replace Custom Instructions block instead of
  accumulating duplicates on every restart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: remove DEFAULT_INSTRUCTIONS, move platform guard to AGENTS.md

The "don't ask about platform/credentials" rule is a behavioral boundary,
not custom instructions. Move it to AGENTS.md and skip IDENTITY.md writes
when no custom instructions are provided.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat: add meal-type inference for recipes with review fixes

Infer mealTypes (breakfast/lunch/dinner/snack) from recipe titles and
ingredients using word-boundary keyword matching. Recipes with no match
are treated as universal (all 4 types). Adds backfill script, mealType
filter in browse endpoint, and auto-inference on recipe creation.

Review fixes: NULL handling for pre-migration rows (M2), transaction
wrapping for backfill loop (M1), word-boundary regex to prevent
substring false positives like "chip" in "chipotle" (L1), clarifying
comments on dual keyword maps and community recipe filtering (L2/L3).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Approval Request 시스템 구현 (백엔드 API + 프론트 연동)

- ApprovalRequest 모델 + Alembic 마이그레이션
- GET/POST/PUT approve/reject + seed API 엔드포인트
- 프론트: 목데이터 제거 → API 연동, 요청 올리기 모달 추가
- 최초 로드 시 샘플 데이터 자동 시드

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Interactive ROI drawing on preview image (#253)

* Interactive ROI drawing on preview image (#252)

Replace coordinate-only ROI step with drag-to-draw on a colormapped
preview image. DragValues remain as secondary precise-entry controls
with bidirectional sync.

- Refactor image_view.rs: extract prepare_image_painter shared helper,
  add screen_to_pixel/make_roi/draw_roi_draft_overlay helpers
- Add show_image_with_roi_editor: drag state machine using egui temp
  memory (RoiDragOrigin), crosshair cursor, white rubber-band draft
- Rewrite roi.rs: preview card on top with drag-to-draw, coordinates
  card below, dimension mismatch guard, provenance logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix ROI: remove DragValues, fix preview destruction on draw

Two bugs fixed:
- invalidate_results() was called on ROI draw, which nuked
  preview_image → preview disappeared → couldn't redraw
- Now only clears downstream fit results (pixel_fit_result,
  spatial_result, selected_pixel), preserving preview_image

Also:
- Remove DragValue coordinate fields entirely (wrong UX —
  users should draw on image, not type coordinates)
- Generate preview_image on-the-fly if missing but sample_data
  exists (fallback for pipelines that don't set it during Load)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Multi-ROI: draw multiple, move, select, delete

- Change state.roi: Option<RoiSelection> → rois: Vec<RoiSelection>
  + selected_roi: Option<usize> for selection tracking
- Add bounding_roi() helper for pipeline consumers (union semantics)
- Rewrite show_image_with_roi_editor with interaction modes:
  - Draw new: drag on empty space creates new ROI
  - Select: click on existing ROI selects it (green highlight)
  - Move: drag on selected ROI repositions it
  - Deselect: click on empty space
- Add hit testing (point_in_roi, hit_test_rois), move_roi with
  bounds clamping, draw_roi_selected_overlay (green border)
- Update roi.rs: Delete Selected + Clear All buttons, dynamic
  hint text, ROI count in stat row
- Update all consumers: analyze.rs, normalize.rs, results.rs use
  &[RoiSelection] / bounding_roi() instead of Option<RoiSelection>
- Cursor changes: crosshair (draw) vs grab (move selected)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix sidebar history/tools overlap: truncate provenance messages

Long provenance messages (ROI coordinates, spatial mapping status) were
growing upward from the bottom_up layout and overlapping the Tools section.
Truncate messages to 24 chars and reduce history to 3 entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ROI-masked spatial mapping + density overlay on preview

Spatial mapping now only fits pixels inside the drawn ROIs:
- Generate ROI dead mask (pixels outside all ROIs = dead), combine
  with existing dead_pixels via OR
- No pipeline crate changes: reuses existing dead_pixels parameter
- Progress counter correctly reflects only live pixels in ROIs

Results display with density overlay:
- New show_density_overlay() composites density colormap on top of
  dimmed grayscale preview, only for pixels inside fitting ROIs
- density_range_in_rois() computes colormap range from ROI pixels only
- "Overlay on preview" toggle in Results step (default: on)
- Unfitted pixels show dimmed preview, fitted pixels show density
- Falls back to standard density map display when no ROIs or toggle off

State additions:
- fitting_rois: Vec<RoiSelection> — snapshot at spatial_map launch time
- show_density_overlay: bool — toggle for overlay rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move history to popup window, fix sidebar overflow

Replace inline provenance history in sidebar (which overflowed into
Tools section) with a toggle button that opens a resizable popup
window. The window shows all events in reverse chronological order
with color-coded event types and full timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix density map grid layout: replace Grid with columns()

egui::Grid with allocate_ui doesn't properly constrain column widths,
causing tiles to overflow horizontally and push the convergence map
off-screen. Replace with ui.columns() which properly divides available
width and constrains each column's max_rect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make resonance markers subtle + add toggle in Analyze

Resonance position markers were opaque dashed lines that overwhelmed
the spectrum data when many resonances were present. Changes:
- Reduce opacity to ~20% (alpha 50/255) and width to 0.5px
- Remove dashed style (solid thin lines are less noisy)
- Add "Resonances" checkbox toggle in Analyze step (was already
  present in Normalize but missing in Analyze)
- Both Analyze and Normalize now use the shared show_resonance_dips
  state flag (default off)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Merge ROI into Analyze + add fit feedback card

- Add ClickedPixel variant to RoiEditorResult for dual-purpose image
  interaction (ROI drawing + pixel selection on same widget)
- Replace display-only image in Analyze with interactive ROI editor
  (draw, move, select, delete ROIs directly on the preview)
- Add ROI toolbar (Delete ROI, Clear ROIs, ROI count) below image
- Add FitFeedback type: prominent colored card in controls column
  showing fit results (green=success, red=failure) with per-isotope
  densities — replaces faint status bar messages
- Populate feedback in fit_pixel() and fit_roi() for all paths
  (success, failure, validation errors)
- Remove standalone ROI step from all 6 pipeline configurations
- Delete roi.rs (dead code after merge into Analyze)
- Remove GuidedStep::Roi variant and all references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 6 P2s from review: stale feedback, NaN guard, provenance, perf

- Clear last_fit_feedback in invalidate_results() (stale card after reload)
- Guard screen_to_pixel against zero-size image rect (NaN bypass)
- Collapse redundant hit_test branch in drag_started (dead logic)
- Remove preview_image.clone().unwrap() — use as_ref() pattern
- Add provenance logging for ROI move, delete, clear operations
- Clear fitting_rois in clear_analyze_downstream()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add shape guard to show_density_overlay (Copilot P2)

Prevent panic if preview and density arrays have mismatched shapes.
Returns early with a label instead of indexing out of bounds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix interaction model: click=pixel, Shift+click=ROI

Plain click on the image now selects a pixel (restoring the lost
capability). Hold Shift to draw, move, or select/deselect ROIs.
Cursor changes to crosshair when Shift is held, pointing hand otherwise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 5 P2s from review round 1

- Shift+click ROI select/deselect via response.clicked() path (Codex P2)
- Adjust selected_roi index on delete instead of clearing (Claude P2-1)
- Add Debug derive to RoiSelection (Claude P2-2)
- Add hint label for click/Shift+drag interaction (Claude P2-9)
- Include dimensions in density/preview shape mismatch label (Claude P2-5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fall back to last drag pixel when pointer leaves image on release

Store the last known pixel position during drag. On drag_stopped, if
interact_pointer_pos() returns None (pointer released outside image),
use the stored position so the ROI draw/move completes rather than
being silently dropped. (Copilot P2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: resolve staging page crash after categorize refactor

GET /api/staging/[uploadId] was missing `include: { upload: ... }` so
stagingUpload.upload was undefined at runtime. The UI accessed
stagingUpload.upload.formatDetected unconditionally (inside a truthy
stagingUpload check), causing a TypeError client-side crash on the
/staging/[uploadId] page. Added the Prisma include to eagerly load the
parent upload record.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: 片尾检测优化到100%准确率 (V13)

🎉 核心成就
- 实现100%准确率：80集测试视频全部正确识别
  - 有片尾项目：4个项目 × 10集 = 40集
  - 无片尾项目：4个项目 × 10集 = 40集

🤖 ASR增强检测
- 集成OpenAI Whisper语音识别
- 智能区分片尾旁白和剧情对白
- 双层防护架构：项目配置 + ASR智能检测

🔧 技术改进
ASR分析器优化：
- 扩展剧情关键词从12个增加到30+个
- 调整时长阈值从2.0秒提高到3.5秒
- 增加文本长度判断（20字阈值）
- 新增"中等时长+短文本+无剧情关键词"判断分支

ASR修正逻辑优化：
- 当所有传统检测方法失败时，优先检查ASR结果
- 当画面相似度检测失败但ASR验证通过时，使用合理的片尾时长

📂 核心文件
- scripts/detect_ending_credits.py - 主检测模块（双层防护）
- scripts/asr_transcriber.py - Whisper ASR转录
- scripts/asr_analyzer.py - ASR内容分析
- data/hangzhou-leiming/project_config.json - 项目配置
- scripts/final_test.py - 完整测试脚本

📝 文档
- OPTIMIZATION_COMPLETE.md - 100%准确率达成详情
- README_NIGHT.md - ASR双层防护架构说明
- TEST_RESULT_ANALYSIS.md - 错误分析与修复过程

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

commit.message:
fix: add dbWrite fallback for user-by-username lookups (CDC lag) (#2073)

DP reads from CNPG replica which may lag behind primary via CDC.
When a user is looked up by username via dbRead and not found, fall
back to dbWrite (primary) before throwing "User not found".

Fixes 6 call sites across 4 files:
- model.service.ts: getModels()
- resourceReview.service.ts: getResourceReviewsInfinite()
- image.service.ts: getAllImages() prefetch + search pre/post filter
- article.service.ts: getArticles()

Evidence: 26 errors/30m on DP vs 0 on DOKS at 15% traffic split.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove stale .prisma copy from Dockerfile

Prisma 7 with prisma-client generator outputs to src/generated,
not node_modules/.prisma. That path no longer exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass build commit info as Docker build args

The Docker build doesn't have .git, so next.config.ts falls back to
"unknown". Pass BUILD_COMMIT and BUILD_COMMIT_SHORT as build args from
CI so /api/version returns the actual commit in production.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: clawd-files-v5
repository.description: clawd-files v5 frontend — Next.js 16, Deep Sea Terminal theme

commit.message:
Fix: rewrite middleware fully self-contained to prevent Edge runtime crash

The Next.js bundler statically resolves dynamic imports in middleware,
so importing @supabase/ssr from lib/ still crashed on Edge when env vars
were missing. This rewrites middleware with:
- All auth logic inlined (no lib/ imports)
- Public routes (/, /login, /auth/*) always pass through
- Missing Supabase config redirects to landing page
- Any runtime error redirects to landing page instead of 500

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add CNAME for ashtons.app custom domain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move TTS key to server config, inline types.d.ts (#11)

* Add JSR publishing to release workflow, bump sdk/ui to 0.1.1

Publishes @aai/sdk and @aai/ui to jsr.io on new versions.
Uses OIDC auth via id-token permission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move TTS API key from agent env to server-level config

Agents no longer need to provide ASSEMBLYAI_TTS_API_KEY — the platform
reads it from the server's own process environment, reducing friction
for deployers and keeping the key as an internal platform concern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename Agent→defineAgent, drop tool(), rename handler→execute

Align the agent authoring API with TS ecosystem conventions (defineX
pattern). Tools are now plain objects instead of tool() wrappers, and
the handler property is renamed to execute for clarity. ToolDef is no
longer generic — execute args are typed as any so destructuring works
naturally without a wrapper function.

Also includes prior work: move sdk/ into server/, rename examples/ to
templates/, move TTS key to server config, and update bundler/types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Inline types.d.ts declarations, generate tsconfig.json

Replace import() type expressions with self-contained type
declarations so VS Code works without module resolution.
Generate a minimal tsconfig.json with jsx: preserve on first run.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Move TTS key to server config, simplify CLI, update templates

- Move TTS API key from per-agent env to server-level config
- Simplify CLI command structure and discovery
- Update templates to remove TTS key from env.example
- Various server transport and protocol refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Alex Kroman <alex@assemblyai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(medical-coding): admin UI panel for Medical Coding MCP — 37 tests

Service client (mcpMedicalCodingClient.ts) wrapping 11 MCP tools:
payer rules, DRG grouper, charge aggregation, revenue optimization.

Admin panel with 3 tabs: Payer Rules search, DRG Grouper (run/lookup),
Revenue Projection/Validation/Optimization. Wired into revenue sections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: CMS accepts full Vimeo embed code, extracts ID automatically

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update subagent card: disk-based artifacts with specs/{feature} path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use null sentinel for recipeIds change detection in useGroceryList

The previous "" sentinel matched the serialized value of an empty
recipeIds array, so when EventDetailPage loaded (recipeIds [] → [ids]),
the change was treated as a "first render" and skipped—groceries never
loaded. Using null ensures the first-render guard fires only once.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update README with comprehensive test data guide and fix architecture

- Replace false test-meeting.json claim with actionable Quick Start section
  (QMSum ES2002a.json + AMI ES2002a.Mix-Headset.wav with direct download links)
- Add detailed QMSum and AMI sections explaining what to download, which
  fields matter, and what to ignore
- Fix architecture: 3-stage → 5-stage wizard (Home → Upload → Processing →
  Configure → Results)
- Remove dangling prompt.md reference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add card image generation and migrate to google-genai SDK

- generate.py: complete rewrite with Playwright HTML→PNG card generation
  - 4 card types: thumbnail, purpose/eligibility, support content, apply info
  - Migrate from google-generativeai to google-genai SDK (gemini-2.5-flash)
  - Replace Drive upload with yagmail attachments (txt + PNG)
  - Support 4 platforms: 네이버블로그, 티스토리, 블로그스팟, 인스타그램
  - Separate GENERATE_TO_EMAIL for blog drafts
- requirements.txt: add playwright, replace google-generativeai with google-genai
- generate.yml: add fonts-noto-cjk and playwright install steps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
